_comment: Sample index served from this repository. install.bundled lets the packaged gallery install the starter widgets without network access. The `requires` field is a display-only gallery badge for widgets that need an external CLI/runtime. `category` is an optional curated grouping surfaced as gallery filter chips (falls back to `tags`). `screenshot` (optional, http(s)/file URL) renders a preview thumbnail.
name: barshelf official registry

widgets.name: Hello
widgets.description: Minimal starter widget — a plain shell script rendering a view tree. No dependencies; seeded automatically on first run.
widgets.author: barshelf
widgets._comment: Fallback URL is private until BarShelf is published; bundled install is authoritative in packaged builds.

widgets.name: Recent Files
widgets.description: Stashbar (file-stack) style stack of the most recent files in a folder of your choice — inspired by https://github.com/jiunbae/stashbar. Pure workflow widget, no dependencies; seeded automatically on first run.
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: aas Usage
widgets.description: Usage meter for aas (Agent Account Switcher) accounts — see https://github.com/Open330/aas. Requires the aas CLI: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open330/aas/main/install.sh | sh
widgets.author: barshelf

widgets.name: OTP Codes
widgets.description: One-time password codes straight from your OTPeek vault — see https://github.com/jiunbae/otpeek. Requires the otpeek CLI and a configured vault (the vault password is read from the macOS Keychain).
widgets.author: barshelf
widgets._comment: Fallback URL is private until BarShelf is published; bundled install is authoritative in packaged builds.

widgets.name: Script Clock
widgets.description: Live ticking clock demo for the deno-ts script runtime. Requires Deno (brew install deno).
widgets.author: barshelf
widgets._comment: Fallback URL is private until BarShelf is published; bundled install is authoritative in packaged builds.
